title: Workout Plan (Jul 2022)
html:
Weekly split — Mon all-around, Tue legs, Wed push, Thu pull, dedicated core block, Sun softball — written summer 2022 home in grants pass or. Same fitness fixation that later becomes the brotein thesis. Sunday is captioned with crude/joke goals ("Eat ass, Get Grass / Hit dingers / Wife a bitch up") — period-piece humor between Yahir and friends.

TL;DR

  • Yahir's summer 2022 push/pull/legs gym split, written at home in grants pass or.
  • Specific lifts: incline DB press, hack squats, Bulgarian splits, pull-ups, preacher curls.
  • Sunday block reserved for softball — recreational team play.
  • Same fitness-as-system mindset that later becomes brotein.
  • Companion to 2022 10 15 Dialing in Diet — workout split + diet protocol attempted in tandem.
